skills.name: Context Compression
skills.description: Guides SAYON to compress long-form context efficiently, preserving signal and dropping noise.
skills.trigger: Active during file summarisation and request rewriting in Phase 1

skills.name: Interleaved Thinking
skills.description: Guides SEREN to structure reasoning traces for maximum clarity and correctness.
skills.trigger: Always active in SEREN execution turns

skills.name: LLM-as-Judge
skills.description: Structured rubric-based evaluation for SAYON's per-task review. Replaces binary approve/reject with scored, reasoned decisions.
skills.trigger: Active during SAYON per-task review in Phase 4

skills.name: Reflexion Critique
skills.description: Guides SEREN's final holistic review with structured self-critique patterns.
skills.trigger: Active during SEREN final validation in Phase 4.5
